title: The Union Oath.
content:
By the Revolution's dead,
    By their Blood in battle shed,
    By the Earth that drank their gore,
    By the Heaven in which they soar,
    By the Union Stripe and Star,
    By the God of Righteous War,
    Swear to conquer, or to die!
    Swear to conquer,
    Swear to conquer,
    Swear to conquer now, or die!

    By the Revolution's dead,
    By their Blood in battle shed,
    By the Earth that drank their gore,
    By the Heaven in which they soar,
    By the Union Stripe and Star,
    By the God of Righteous War,
    We will conquer now, or die!
    We will conquer!
    We will conquer!
    We will conquer now, or die!
meaning:
This evocative piece by A. H. Laidlaw, titled "The Union Oath.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
